narrative:
Walton Hills-00-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 893 registered voters, with 51.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.5 percentage points.
